title: Senior Data Analyst (Bank | Up to 9.5k)
description:
The Opportunity

  • Adecco is working with a leading bank to find a 12months contract Senior Data Analyst

Department: COO/Data Hub
Team: Data Science and Advanced Analytics
Job Title: Senior Data Analyst

Key Responsibilities:
• Act as a strategic partner to business stakeholders, shaping problem statements, defining solution approaches, and ensuring alignment with enterprise‑wide data initiatives.
• Lead end‑to‑end delivery of advanced analytics solutions, including data modelling, ETL/ELT workflows, feature engineering, and visualization.
• Develop high‑impact dashboards, analytics applications, and self‑service tools, ensuring usability, scalability, and performance.
• Conduct code reviews, enforce engineering standards, and oversee testing, documentation, and compliance with governance, risk, and security protocols.
• Drive the adoption of best practices in analytics engineering, data quality automation, DevOps, and agile methodologies.
• Collaborate with technology, architecture, and security teams to design solutions aligned with enterprise data strategy and technology standards.
• Mentor junior analysts, provide technical guidance, and lead knowledge‑sharing initiatives.
• Evaluate emerging tools, AI/ML capabilities, and data platforms to support continuous innovation.

Requirements:
• 5–7 years of experience in data analytics, data engineering, or analytics product development, with strong hands‑on experience in Python (pandas, numpy, modular structuring) and SQL.
• Strong expertise in data modelling, analytical SQL patterns, performance tuning, and working with relational and cloud‑based data platforms.
• Advanced proficiency in visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) with a track record of building enterprise‑grade dashboards.
• Experience designing scalable data pipelines, reusable analytics components, and production‑quality code.
• Strong communication and stakeholder management capabilities, with experience influencing senior business leaders.
• Proven ability to lead small teams or workstreams, manage delivery timelines, and ensure solution quality.

Advantageous Skills:
• Experience with system design, cloud‑native architecture, security controls, and infrastructure fundamentals.
• Hands‑on exposure to CI/CD pipelines, Git workflows, and DevOps practices.
• Understanding of ML/AI workflows and practical application in business contexts.
• Experience in private banking or financial services, especially in analytics transformation.

Next Step

  • Send your resume to amos.tan@adecco.com 
  • All shortlisted candidates will be contacted

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
